memory_candidates.title: Provider selection is not provider invocation
memory_candidates.summary: When YAML policy selects a provider, think-tank must still mark that provider as not_invoked until a real dispatch, invocation, and recovery path runs.
memory_candidates.expires_when: User changes the project policy model or provider invocation contract.
refresh_trigger: Before changing provider policy runtime semantics.
When provider invocation matrix or routing checks change.

boundaries: This sample proposes local project memory only.
It does not write to public think-tank core files by default.
